message:
feat(web): add bundle size monitoring infrastructure

Set up bundle monitoring to track and prevent bundle bloat:
- Added @next/bundle-analyzer (run with ANALYZE=true)
- Added size-limit with baseline limits
- Current state: JS 660KB, CSS 41KB (gzipped)

New npm scripts:
- analyze: Visual bundle analysis in browser
- size-limit: Check bundle sizes against limits
- size-limit:check: JSON output for CI integration

Closes jeffreysprompts.com-qg15
Follow-up: jeffreysprompts.com-7sdv (reduce to 300KB target)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,14 @@
+[
+  {
+    "name": "Total Client Bundle (JS)",
+    "path": ".next/static/chunks/**/*.js",
+    "gzip": true,
+    "limit": "700 KB"
+  },
+  {
+    "name": "Total Client Bundle (CSS)",
+    "path": ".next/static/chunks/**/*.css",
+    "gzip": true,
+    "limit": "100 KB"
+  }
+]

@@ -12,7 +12,10 @@
     "lint:all": "eslint && oxlint",
     "test": "vitest run",
     "test:watch": "vitest",
-    "test:coverage": "vitest run --coverage"
+    "test:coverage": "vitest run --coverage",
+    "analyze": "ANALYZE=true next build",
+    "size-limit": "size-limit",
+    "size-limit:check": "size-limit --json"
   },
   "dependencies": {
     "@jeffreysprompts/core": "workspace:*",
@@ -42,7 +45,9 @@
   },
   "devDependencies": {
     "@axe-core/playwright": "^4.11.0",
+    "@next/bundle-analyzer": "^16.1.1",
     "@playwright/test": "^1.57.0",
+    "@size-limit/preset-app": "^12.0.0",
     "@tailwindcss/postcss": "^4",
     "@testing-library/jest-dom": "^6.9.1",
     "@testing-library/react": "^16.3.1",
@@ -59,6 +64,7 @@
     "next-sitemap": "^4.2.3",
     "oxlint": "^1.38.0",
     "playwright": "^1.57.0",
+    "size-limit": "^12.0.0",
     "tailwindcss": "^4",
     "typescript": "^5",
     "vitest": "^4.0.16"
